Member.title: Member
Member.description: Represents a participant in the Chit Fund, including their personal details and contribution information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Member entity.

name.description: The full name of the chit fund member.

phone.description: The contact phone number of the member.

joinDate.description: The date when the member joined the chit fund.

monthlyAmount.description: The fixed monthly contribution amount required from the member.

status.description: The current status of the member (e.g., 'active', 'inactive').

deactivatedAt.description: Timestamp when the member was deactivated.

paymentType.description: The preferred frequency of payment for this specific member (e.g., 'Daily', 'Monthly').

chitGroup.description: The name of the chit scheme the member belongs to.

totalPaid.description: Sum of all payments made by the member.

pendingDays.description: Automatic tracking of missed payment days for Daily users.

pendingAmount.description: The exact currency deficit for this member.

yesterdayPending.description: Flag indicating if the member was pending yesterday (1 for yes, 0 for no).

lastPendingUpdateDate.description: The last date (YYYY-MM-DD) when pendingDays was auto-calculated.

Payment.title: Payment
Payment.description: Records a single monthly payment or a pending amount made by a member towards the chit fund.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Payment entity.

memberId.description: Reference to the Member who made this payment.

memberName.description: The name of the member for whom the payment was recorded.

month.description: The specific month and year for which the payment is made.

targetDate.description: The specific date for which this payment/pending entry is targeted (YYYY-MM-DD).

amountPaid.description: The actual amount of money paid or recorded as pending.

paymentDate.description: The date when this entry was recorded.

status.description: The current status of the entry (e.g., 'success', 'pending', 'paid').

ChitRound.title: ChitRound
ChitRound.description: Details of a completed chit fund round, including the winning member and the amount won.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChitRound entity.

name.description: The name of the chit scheme.

roundNumber.description: The sequential number identifying this specific chit round.

winnerMemberId.description: Reference to the Member who won this chit round.

winnerName.description: The name of the member who won this chit round.

winningAmount.description: The amount of money received by the winner.

date.description: The date when this chit round concluded.

collectionType.description: The frequency of collections for this chit round.

monthlyAmount.description: The amount collected monthly for this scheme.

totalMembers.description: The maximum number of members allowed in this scheme.

startDate.description: The explicit start date of this scheme group.

endDate.description: The explicit end date of this scheme group.

MonthlyTarget.title: MonthlyTarget
MonthlyTarget.description: A financial collection goal set by the admin for a specific month and year.

AuditLog.title: AuditLog
AuditLog.description: History of administrative actions taken in the system.

Cycle.title: Cycle
Cycle.description: Represents a custom date range for monitoring chit fund activity.

definition.description: Stores details of completed chit rounds.

firestore.reasoning: The application manages members, payments, chit rounds, collection targets, audit logs, period locks, and custom cycles.
